originalTitle: Oil prices extend gains after hours as U.S. forces conduct additional strikes on Iran
summary: Oil prices settled at their highest levels in more than two weeks on Wednesday, then extended their gains in after-hours trading after the U.S. military said it launched additional strikes on Iran.
content: Oil prices settled at their highest levels in more than two weeks on Wednesday, then extended their gains in after-hours trading after the U.S. military said it launched additional strikes on Iran.
chineseTitle: 由于美军对伊朗进行更多打击，油价盘后延续涨势
chineseSummary: 周三，油价收于两周多来的最高水平，随后在美国军方表示对伊朗发动进一步打击后，油价在盘后交易中扩大涨幅。
chineseContent: 周三，油价收于两周多来的最高水平，随后在美国军方表示对伊朗发动进一步打击后，油价在盘后交易中扩大涨幅。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
